axes.name: Checked
axes.note: JS must set input.indeterminate = true for indeterminate pseudo-class

axes.name: Indeterminate
axes.note: Requires JS. Checked=False+Indeterminate=True is absent from manifest (semantically invalid — not implemented)

axes.name: Style
axes.css_mechanism: Implicit default = Primary; .checkbox--neutral BEM modifier for Neutral

discarded_axes.name: RTL
discarded_axes.reason: Component is geometrically symmetric. RTL produces no visual difference. Discarded.

discarded_axes.name: Checked=False+Indeterminate=True
discarded_axes.reason: Absent from manifest. Semantically invalid combination. Not implemented.

variants.calculation: 3 effective checked states × 6 interaction states × 3 sizes × 2 styles = 108
discarded: Checked=False + Indeterminate=True — absent from manifest, semantically invalid

root.notes: Root is <label> for native click-to-toggle. position: relative creates stacking context for ripple ::before.

input.notes: Visually hidden via opacity: 0. Remains in accessibility tree. z-index: 3 — sits above box to receive pointer events and keyboard focus.

box.notes: Visual box. position: relative creates stacking context for focus ring ::after.

checkmark.notes: Hidden by default. Shown on :checked:not(:indeterminate). Uses currentColor for stroke.

indeterminate_mark.notes: Hidden by default. Shown on :indeterminate. Uses currentColor for stroke.

ripple.notes: Pseudo-element on root (not on box). Interaction Layer rule: attach to root component. Ripple overflows layout box.

focus_ring.notes: Pseudo-element on box. Geometry is box-relative (box + 8px). mix-blend-mode: multiply.

ripple.reason: Interaction Layer rule: attach to root component. Ripple is a sibling of box in Figma, not inside box.

focus_ring.reason: Focus ring geometry is relative to box dimensions. Attaching to box keeps geometry self-contained.

token_bridge.note: All --checkbox-* tokens bridge to token.css primitives. --Controls-* and --Global-* are Figma variable names only — they do not exist in token.css.

implementation_notes: Ripple (.checkbox::before) overflows the layout box — parent must not clip (overflow: visible is the default).
Ripple is suppressed on keyboard focus using :has(.checkbox__input:focus-visible). Requires Chrome 105+, Firefox 121+, Safari 15.4+.
Indeterminate state requires JS: input.indeterminate = true AND input.setAttribute('aria-checked', 'mixed').
Read-only: pointer-events: none on root. aria-readonly='true' on input. Input is NOT disabled — stays in tab order.
Disabled: pointer-events: none on root. Native 'disabled' attribute on input. Removed from tab order.
Focus ring uses mix-blend-mode: multiply — matches Figma design intent.
#161616 (focus ring color) has no named primitive in token.css. Used as literal. Add --ink-black: #161616 to token.css globally.
